Why My Blog Wouldn't Update: A Service Workers Stale-Cache Story

Readers kept telling me my blog hadn't been updated in ages — but I was posting regularly. After some digging it turned out to be a Service Workers issue left over from when I'd dropped PWA from my blog. This post walks through how I diagnosed it, how to manually unregister Service Workers in Chrome DevTools, and how to auto-unregister them for visitors so they don't get stuck on a stale cache.
